# Liraglutide 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Liraglutide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Liraglutide</strong> 目前有 <strong>3 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Liraglutide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Xultophy is indicated for the treatment of adults with type-2 diabetes mellitus to improve glycaemic control in combination with oral glucose-lowering medicinal products when these alone or combined...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>opsismodysplasia（96.1%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（95.6%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（95.3%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（95.3%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（95.1%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（93.1%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（92.3%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（92.2%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（91.9%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（91.7%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（91.3%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（90.4%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（65.2%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（64.1%）</li>
<li>congenital temporomandibular joint ankylosis（63.1%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（62.7%）</li>
<li>hypercarotenemia and vitamin A deficiency, autosomal recessive（61.4%）</li>
<li>woolly hair, autosomal recessive 3（61.4%）</li>
<li>mitral valve prolapse, myxomatous（61.1%）</li>
<li>anuria（60.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/liraglutide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
